data.title: ZachXBT questions MemeCore on valuation and token supply. Probe widens after RAVE token collapse.
data.description: ZachXBT has issued a challenge to MemeCore regarding its valuation, highlighting concerns about insider-held supply amidst a widening probe following the collapse of the RAVE token. ZachXBT is questioning MemeCore to justify its valuation, focusing on the alleged insider-held supply. The investigation comes after the RAVE token's downfall, with ZachXBT raising doubts and pushing for transparency. The situation has sparked interest within the community, with the involved parties under scrutiny. This development adds to the ongoing discussion within the cryptocurrency sector regarding transparency and accountability.

data.title: Construction Aggregates Market to Reach US$ 875.4 Billion by 2033 Driven by Infrastructure Expansion and Sustainable Material Adoption - Persistence Market Research
data.description: On April 20, 2026, a prominent management consulting firm, Persistence Market Research, shared an update on the construction aggregates sector. These crucial materials such as sand, gravel, and crushed stone are fundamental to contemporary construction activities...

data.title: Scientific Games Technology to Power the Minnesota Lottery's Omnichannel Sales
data.description: In an announcement made on April 20, 2026, in Atlanta, it was revealed that Scientific Games has been chosen by the Minnesota Lottery for a groundbreaking tech solution partnership. This significant move comes in the form of a lengthy seven-year contract that emphasizes expansion and innovation. The collaboration aims to modernize the lottery system by incorporating cutting-edge technologies. This partnership is expected to foster growth and development in the global lottery industry, showcasing the commitment of both parties to enhancing the lottery experience.

data.title: U.S. News & World Report Names Watercrest Winter Park a Best Memory Care Community in Nationwide Survey
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida, Watercrest Winter Park Assisted Living and Memory Care has once again been honored with the title of "Best Memory Care Community" by U.S. News & World Report for the fifth year in a row. This prestigious recognition solidifies the facility's reputation as a top choice in senior living.

data.title: Bitmine's recent purchase of 101,627 ETH brings its total holdings to 4,976,485, around 4.12% of the supply.
data.description: Last week, Bitmine acquired 101,627 Ether, increasing their total holdings to 4,976,485 ETH. This accounts for roughly 4.12% of the total Ethereum supply. The company aims to reach a 5% target in the near future.
Investor discloses 8.3% ownership stake in Picton Property Income Limited without specifying source.

data.title: Morocco Strategic Minerals Announces Proposed Private Placement
data.description: Morocco Strategic Minerals recently revealed their plans for a non-brokered private placement, aiming to raise up to $5 million. The offering involves units priced at $0.15 each, with an additional half-warrant available for purchase at $0.25 within a 24-month period.

data.title: RS and Festo make smart electric motion accessible
data.description: RS is offering Festo's Simplified Motion Series, which aids in shifting from pneumatic to smart electric motion in industrial manufacturing and intralogistics. The series features cost-efficient electromechanical actuators that improve efficiency and productivity. This transition is crucial for industries looking to enhance their operations, with an emphasis on cost-effectiveness and performance. The series is designed to meet the evolving needs of the sectors, and it targets a wide range of applications. This offering demonstrates the integration of more advanced technologies into traditional industrial processes to drive innovation and competitiveness. It highlights the importance of adapting to modern solutions to stay relevant in an increasingly digital world.

data.title: AMGA Honors IKS Health, an AI-Powered Care Enablement Platform, with Distinguished Corporate Partner Award
data.description: In Dallas, the American Medical Group Association (AMGA) recently awarded IKS Health the 2026 Distinguished Corporate Partner Award for its notable support of AMGA and its member organizations. IKS Health, a prominent provider of AI-driven and human-led healthcare solutions, was recognized for its collaborative efforts and contributions to the industry. This prestigious award is presented annually to a company that demonstrates a commitment to the team-based approach to healthcare delivery. Through its initiatives and support, IKS Health has showcased excellence in promoting effective healthcare practices.

data.title: ELRON VENTURES PORTFOLIO COMPANY CYBERRIDGE NAMED GLOBAL INFOSEC AWARD WINNER AT RSA CONFERENCE 2026
data.description: TEL AVIV, Israel, April 20, 2026 - Elron Ventures Ltd. (TASE: ELRN), a technology investment company specializing in investing in and advancing technology, has been acknowledged for its role in meeting the increasing need for quantum-safe data transmission and infrastructure-level security. This recognition signifies the expanding demand for these services.

data.title: Conductor Launches Enterprise AgentStack to Power the Next Era of AI Visibility
data.description: A technology company based in New York has introduced a new enterprise suite called AgentStack, which is part of its end-to-end enterprise AEO platform. The suite includes native LLM apps, developer infrastructure, and turnkey agents aimed at assisting brands in enhancing their visibility on AI-driven search platforms. This launch comes as a response to the shift in consumer behavior towards relying on AI to discover and evaluate products rather than evaluating content themselves. The suite is designed to help brands adapt to this change and manage their online presence effectively.

data.title: Josh Stephens Joins Huper as VP of Engineering
data.description: Atlanta-based Huper Corporation has appointed Josh Stephens as its new VP of Engineering, tasked with establishing the engineering framework for the product, enhancing software development processes, and expanding the team through recruitment efforts. The company aims to develop a digital chief of staff for the future and Stephens is collaborating with Michael Anton (CEO), Andrew Howard (Chairman), and Aidan Kehoe (Co-Founder). This move signifies a strategic step towards growth and innovation within the company.

data.title: PPG introduces end-to-end protective coatings solutions, application services for data centers
data.description: PPG, listed on NYSE as PPG, revealed its plan to display a range of protective coatings solutions at the upcoming Data Center World conference and expo in Washington, D.C., taking place from April 20th to 23rd. The company offers specialized coating solutions for both interior and exterior data center infrastructure, equipment, and components. Positioned as a one-stop supplier for these needs, PPG experts will be present at booth #457 during the event to showcase their products and application services.

data.title: 6sense Releases 2026 State of BDR Report, Revealing AI Adoption at an All-Time High and Support as the Defining Factor in BDR Performance
data.description: A new report has been released by 6sense®, known as the 2026 State of the BDR Report. This is the fifth yearly edition of the study that focuses on the role of business development representatives (BDRs). The report is based on feedback from BDRs across different markets and industries, offering a comprehensive view of how BDR teams function, succeed, and evolve. It provides insights for revenue leaders, drawing from a large pool of responses to showcase trends and practices in the industry.

data.title: HomeCEU Introduces New OT Grad Toolkit to Support Occupational Therapy Graduates Looking for Jobs in the Healthcare Industry
data.description: A company based in Roseville, California, HomeCEU, known for providing continuing education to healthcare professionals specializing in therapy professions, has recently launched the New OT Grad Toolkit. This toolkit is created to assist new occupational therapy (OT) graduates in securing their initial job in the healthcare industry. The aim is to alleviate the stress and uncertainty often experienced when entering the workforce in occupational therapy. The company's focus is on offering support to graduates so they can confidently transition into their professional roles.

data.title: Illumia Wins 2025 Ellucian Partner Award for Integration Excellence
data.description: A company based in Scottsdale, Arizona, formerly known as Transact + CBORD under the name Illumia, has been acknowledged for its excellence in integration by receiving the 2025 Ellucian Partner Award. Illumia, recognized as a top innovator in various sectors including higher education, healthcare, senior living, and corporate technology, has been honored for its seamless bidirectional integration between Illumia Integrated Payments and Ellucian Student, which is supported by Colleague. This integration ensures that financial data related to students remains continuously synchronized in real-time.
